versions.name: Goose Pond Scout Reservation
versions.summary: Scouts BSA resident summer camp on 507 acres surrounding a 43-acre glacial lake in northeastern Pennsylvania, near Lake Wallenpaupack; offers aquatics including whitewater, shooting sports, ATV, climbing and COPE, and over 70 merit badges.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
